description: Shared AI memory platform — gives every LLM (Claude CLI, aicli CLI, Cursor, web UI) identical project memory, billing, multi-LLM workflows, and a unified knowledge graph across all tools.

tech_stack.frontend: Vanilla JS (no framework, no bundler) + Electron shell + Vite dev server
tech_stack.storage_primary: JSONL (history.jsonl with rotation to history_YYMMDDHHSS.jsonl, commit_log.jsonl), JSON, CSV
tech_stack.db_schema: Per-project: commits_{p}, events_{p}, embeddings_{p}, event_tags_{p}, event_links_{p}, memory_items_{p}, project_facts_{p}, pr_graph_runs; shared: users, usage_logs, transactions, session_tags, entity_categories, entity_values, agent_roles, system_roles, user_api_keys (encrypted)
tech_stack.authentication: JWT (python-jose) + bcrypt + DEV_MODE toggle; 3 roles: admin/paid/free; encrypted API keys
tech_stack.llm_providers: Claude (Haiku for synthesis), OpenAI, DeepSeek, Gemini, Grok
tech_stack.workflow_engine: Async DAG executor (asyncio.gather) + YAML config; per-node retry/continue logic
tech_stack.workflow_ui: Cytoscape.js + cytoscape-dagre for graph visualization; 2-pane approval panel for chat negotiation
tech_stack.memory_synthesis: Claude Haiku dual-layer (raw JSONL → interaction_tags → 5 output files)
tech_stack.chunking: Smart chunking: summary + per-class/function (Python/JS/TS) + per-section (MD) + per-file (diff)
tech_stack.mcp: Stdio MCP server with 12+ tools; env var configured (BACKEND_URL, ACTIVE_PROJECT)
tech_stack.deployment: Railway (Dockerfile + railway.toml); local: bash ui/start.sh; desktop: Electron-builder
tech_stack.database_schema: Per-project: commits_{p}, events_{p}, embeddings_{p}, event_tags_{p}, event_links_{p}, memory_items_{p}, project_facts_{p}, pr_graph_runs; shared: users, usage_logs, transactions, session_tags, entity_categories, entity_values, agent_roles, system_roles
tech_stack.config_management: config.py with externalized backend_url, haiku_model, db_pool_max, MCP settings; YAML for pipeline definitions; pyproject.toml for IDE support
tech_stack.db_tables: Per-project: commits_{p}, events_{p}, embeddings_{p}, event_tags_{p}, event_links_{p}, memory_items_{p}, project_facts_{p}, pr_graph_runs; shared: users, usage_logs, transactions, session_tags, entity_categories, entity_values, agent_roles, system_roles
tech_stack.llm_provider_adapters: agents/providers/ with pr_ prefix for pricing and provider implementations
tech_stack.pipeline_engine: Async DAG executor (asyncio.gather for parallel nodes) + YAML config; per-node retry/continue logic; centralized under workflows/ with pipeline_ prefix
tech_stack.pipeline_ui: Cytoscape.js + cytoscape-dagre for graph visualization; 2-pane approval panel for chat negotiation
tech_stack.billing_storage: data/provider_usage/ (provider_costs.json, runtime data); pricing, coupons, user_logs in SQL tables
tech_stack.backend_modules: routers/ for API endpoints, core/ for infrastructure, data/ for data access (dl_ prefix), agents/tools/ for agent implementations (tool_ prefix), agents/mcp/ for MCP server
tech_stack.dev_environment: PyProject.toml + VS Code launch config (.vscode/launch.json); PyCharm: Mark backend/ as Sources Root
tech_stack.database: PostgreSQL 15+ with agent roles initialized; per-project and shared schema tables

key_decisions: Engine/workspace separation: aicli/ contains backend logic; workspace/ stores per-project content; _system/ holds project state
Dual storage: JSONL (history.jsonl with rotation) for primary; PostgreSQL 15+ with pgvector (1536-dim) for semantic search and indexed per-project tables
Electron UI with xterm.js + Monaco + Cytoscape.js; Vanilla JS frontend (no framework/bundler); Vite dev server for local development
JWT authentication (python-jose + bcrypt) with DEV_MODE toggle; 3-tier roles (admin/paid/free); per-user encrypted API keys in database
All LLM providers as independent adapters (Claude, OpenAI, DeepSeek, Gemini, Grok); server holds API keys; client sends none
Async DAG workflow executor via asyncio.gather with loop-back and max_iterations cap; Cytoscape.js visualization
Memory synthesis: Claude Haiku for dual-layer output (raw JSONL → interaction_tags → 5 files); smart chunking per language/section
Backend modular organization: core/ for infrastructure, data/ (dl_ prefix) for data access, routers/ for HTTP endpoints, agents/ for business logic

Per-project tables: commits_{p}, events_{p}, embeddings_{p}, event_tags_{p}, event_links_{p}, memory_items_{p}, project_facts_{p}; shared tables: users, usage_logs, transactions, session_tags, entity_categories, entity_values, agent_roles, system_roles
Encrypted API key storage in data layer (dl_api_keys.py); server-side key management only; clients never send API credentials
MCP server (stdio) with 12+ tools; configured via env vars (BACKEND_URL, ACTIVE_PROJECT); moved to agents/mcp/
SQL queries as module-level constants (_SQL_VERB_ENTITY pattern); dynamic query building via build_update() for safe parameterization
PostgreSQL agent roles properly initialized with real IDs; router mapping queries correct tables per project; no fallback workarounds needed
File-based configuration (api_keys.json) external to backend; sensitive data in .env; pricing/coupons/promotions managed in SQL tables
Thin UI client: settings.json backed by Electron userData; remote server URL support; spawns backend only for local connections
implemented_features: 5-layer memory architecture with /memory endpoint + LLM synthesis via Haiku
Unified history.jsonl across all LLM tools (ui, claude_cli, workflow, cursor)
Per-LLM memory files: _system/claude/CLAUDE.md, MEMORY.md, cursor/rules.md, aicli/context.md
Multi-LLM REPL: Claude, OpenAI, DeepSeek, Gemini, Grok with streaming + retry
YAML workflow executor: file injection, retry, cost tracking, inject_previous_output
Graph workflow engine: async DAG with Cytoscape.js UI, parallel nodes, loop-back edges
FastAPI backend: auth, chat SSE streaming, projects, admin, billing, git, history, workflows, entities, search
Electron UI: collapsible sidebar, 8 tabs (Chat, Summary, Prompts, Code, Flows, Projects, History, Admin)
JWT auth: admin/paid/free roles; DEV_MODE; first-user=admin; REQUIRE_AUTH toggle
Admin panel: 6 tabs (Users, Pricing, Coupons, API Keys, Usage, Billing/Costs)
Multi-user billing: balance, markup, coupons, transaction log, provider balances
Entity/relationship model: categories, values, events, event_tags, event_links (per-project tables)
Session tags + commit tagging (phase/feature/bug_ref); bulk session-tag endpoint
Projects tab: Features/Tasks/Bugs with status toggle, archive, inline create, event_count
History tab: unified sessions + Commits tab (tag inline) + Tags (⬡) tab with 3-column layout
Smart chunking: summary + per-class/function/section/file-diff with metadata filters
Semantic search: pgvector cosine similarity with language/doc_type/file_path/chunk_type filters
MCP server: 8 tools registered in .mcp.json + .cursor/mcp.json
Per-project DB schema: project_table() + ensure_project_schema(); migration endpoint
Claude CLI hooks: auto-commit-push, log_session_stop (reads .jsonl, updates history)
Git auto-deploy: commit-push from UI, auto-pull, LLM-generated commit messages
4-step project wizard: Basics → Git → IDE Support → Review
UI installer: install.sh (one-time setup) + update.sh (git pull) + start.sh
config.py reads ~/.aicli/config.json for WORKSPACE_DIR at startup
in_progress: Tags persistence debugging (2026-03-22) — Planner tag loading issue identified: _plannerState.project fallback categories (null IDs) not triggering cache reload; fix implements force-reload logic in _initPlanner with auto-select of first real category
Planner UI tag display (2026-03-22) — Categories loading but all tags not visible; implementing cache invalidation and re-render flow to ensure full tag hierarchy loads on session/project switch

Backend module restructuring finalization (2026-03-21-22) — Renamed files with prefixes (tool_, pipeline_, pr_, dl_, mem_); extracted SQL queries to module-level constants; completed agents/ reorganization; removed stale core/encryption.py

Database initialization race condition resolution (2026-03-22) — Verified PostgreSQL agent roles have real IDs (10+), router endpoints query proper tables; removed stale fallback workarounds from planner initialization
UI code optimization and dead code removal (2026-03-22) — XSS fixes in markdown.js; 30s timeout in api.js; JSDoc documentation; setInterval cleanup for memory leaks in graph_workflow.js
Memory items and project_facts table population (pending) — Per specification, these tables should be updated to enable improved memory/context mechanism; logic not yet implemented

project_management_page: Project dashboard card: active features (count + top 3), open tasks, recent commits (last 3), workflow runs (last run status + duration)
Activity timeline view: unified event stream (prompts + commits + workflow runs) per project, filterable by type and date
Quick actions panel: + New Feature, + New Task, + New Bug, Run Workflow, Open in Claude CLI
Feature detail panel: click feature → see linked events, commits, workflow runs, related bugs
Kanban-style task board: columns = backlog / in-progress / review / done, drag to move status
Bulk operations: select multiple tasks/features, bulk-tag with phase or entity value
workflow_improvements: Step-by-step run log: per-node timing, token count, cost, output preview in collapsible rows
Re-run from node: click any completed node and re-run from that point with edited prompt
Workflow templates: library of pre-built workflows (feature_cycle, code_review, bug_fix, doc_update) stored in workspace/_templates/workflows/
Feature-linked workflows: when running a workflow, select which feature/task it belongs to; auto-tag all emitted events
Workflow result → task: workflow output can create/update a task entity; closes the loop between AI work and project tracking

deployment.update: bash ui/update.sh (git pull + reinstall deps, never touches workspace/)
deployment.desktop: Electron-builder: Mac dmg (arm64+x64), Windows nsis, Linux AppImage+deb

_synthesis_cache.project_summary: aicli is a shared AI memory platform that integrates with Claude CLI and other LLM platforms, providing unified memory management, project tagging, graph-based workflows, and MCP integration. Currently in active development (v2.2.0) with focus on resolving tag persistence issues, completing backend module restructuring, and ensuring database initialization stability across session switches.
_synthesis_cache.memory_digest: **[2026-03-22]** `claude_cli` — Planner tags loading resolved: identified fallback category fallback (null IDs) preventing cache reload; implemented force-reload logic in `_initPlanner` with auto-selection of first real category to prevent blank right pane and ensure full tag hierarchy visibility. **[2026-03-22]** `backend validation` — Confirmed PostgreSQL agent roles initialized with real IDs (10+); router endpoints verified querying proper per-project tables; removed stale fallback workarounds from previous code. **[2026-03-21]** `module restructuring` — Completed backend reorganization: renamed data access files with `dl_` prefix, pipeline files with `pipeline_` prefix, provider files with `pr_` prefix, tool files with `tool_` prefix; extracted SQL queries to module-level constants (_SQL_VERB_ENTITY pattern); removed stale core/encryption.py. **[2026-03-22]** `UI optimization` — Fixed XSS vulnerabilities in markdown.js; added 30s timeout to api.js; added JSDoc documentation; cleaned up setInterval in graph_workflow.js to prevent memory leaks. **[2026-03-18]** `memory endpoint fix` — Fixed undefined `code_dir` template variable at line 1120 in CLAUDE.md; variable now properly scoped from config. **[2026-03-10]** `data persistence` — Identified tags disappear on session switch; implemented load-once-on-access, update-on-save pattern to reduce redundant SQL calls and improve performance.
